creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 224057
Patch for stunnel

Rework MASTER_SITES, use official mirrors (HTTPS first) and fallback to main site
Drop static library

Reference: https://www.stunnel.org/downloads.html

Compile and run tested on FreeBSD 13.0-RC1 (aarch64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 11.4-RELEASE (amd64)
